title: POLK CARES CENTER - 211info
text: POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DALLAS POLK CARES CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health drop-in services, including suicide prevention, safety planning, and information and referrals to community resources and ongoing care. Also supports recovery from substance use, with treatment referrals and overdose prevention education. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 333 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on holidays (503) 623-9289 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-9289 ext 1 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Polk County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Mental Health Drop In Centers Mental Health Information/Education * Suicide Issues Substance Use Disorder Referrals Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTH AND FAMILY MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
